projects.description: I'm the founder and lead developer of a new open source IoT platform, designed with ease of DIY devices integration in mind. Built with KNI members (https://kni.mini.pw.edu.pl) [Spring (Kotlin) + Angular]

projects.name: Rentally
projects.description: Web application for car rental services. Built for university course. [FastAPI + React.js]

projects.name: Another Todo App
projects.description: To-Do app built with Firebase Firestore as its storage and serverless backend. [React.js + Firestore]

projects.name: RedAlert
projects.description: System allowing users to send emergency requests (with their location) to appropriate public service (e.g. ambulance) based on a series of questions. This app has won Hackathon Idea Kielce 2018. Consists of mobile app for users and webapp for service operators. [React.js + React Native + Express.js]

projects.name: ReadMe
projects.description: Android app that was supposed to help people keep motivated to read their books using reminders and progress statistics. [Android (Java)]
